disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, persistent fast heartbeat that now feels irregular ('hammering out of rhythm') for the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: What is your heart doing right now?
Does the racing feel regular or irregular?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is going really fast and it feels all over the place, like it's hammering out of rhythm. It's been like this and getting worse for a couple of days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe heat intolerance and drenching sweats — needs the air conditioner on maximum yet is still overheating
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling hot or sweaty?
Has the temperature in the room helped at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm burning up from the inside and pouring with sweat. We've got the air conditioner on full and I'm still boiling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 8 kg over three months despite eating normally
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 8 kilos over the last few months and I haven't been trying to — I've actually been eating normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe agitation, restlessness and an altered mental state this evening — pacing, unable to settle, 'not herself'
trigger_question_examples: Is she able to sit still and hold a normal conversation?
Does she seem confused or agitated?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She can't stop pacing and she can't calm down at all. This evening she seems confused and not really herself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New profound weakness of the arms and legs — unable to climb the stairs
trigger_question_examples: Are your arms and legs weaker than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My arms and legs have gone really weak — I can't get up the stairs any more.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective fever / feeling feverishly hot on top of the sweating
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or shivery?
Do you feel hot the way you would with a fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's more than just warm — I feel feverish and hot all through, not just sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no fainting or collapse, and no seizure so far this evening (screened to define escalation triggers)
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, blackouts or fits?
Has she passed out or had a seizure?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain and she hasn't passed out or had a fit — but she's getting worse and I'm frightened.
